description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light. The exterior is predominantly finished in light gray with black window frames, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. Multiple rooms are visible through the expansive windows, including open-plan living spaces and private areas, suggesting a spacious interior layout. The house includes several entry points, with the main entrance marked by a prominent door and adjacent vertical windows. The structure appears to be a single story, with a strong emphasis on horizontal lines and open sightlines. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean surfaces and an emphasis on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a minimalist gray exterior. The design emphasizes open spaces and geometric lines.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway, large windows, and a glimpse into the open-plan interior spaces.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side of the house with additional large windows and a secondary entrance, emphasizing the open, airy layout.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible here, featuring more private rooms and a continuation of the large window design.
description_view_3: This perspective reveals another side with a mix of window sizes and a clear view of the flat roof and modern facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a prominent modern door with vertical side windows, no porch, and a clean, minimalist approach.
